prompt: A highly detailed anime-style cyberpunk dressing-room scene viewed from slightly behind a young woman seated at a vanity with a three-panel mirror. She has a short bob haircut in pastel pink, with a black X-shaped hair clip on the side, pale skin, and a slim build. Her face is mostly hidden by angle and reflection composition. She wears a futuristic black, white, and neon-accented streetwear jacket with a hood, tech patches, straps, and glossy materials over a revealing top, plus black thigh-highs. Large RGB-lit over-ear headphones rest around her neck, glowing in magenta, cyan, and green. One visible upper arm has luminous holographic tattoo-like circuitry patterns in pink and blue. The mirror creates an infinite reflection tunnel of her repeated image receding into the distance, with at least 8 visible repeated reflections of her head and shoulders in the center panels. In the right mirror panel, her reflected pose shows one hand lifted near her mouth in a thoughtful, slightly shy gesture. The vanity surface is crowded with cosmetics and desk items: around 20 visible objects including lipstick tubes, makeup brushes in holders, perfume or skincare bottles, compact cases, small jars, a keyboard with pink backlighting, and a smartphone or small display device. Add a small round neon cat-face desk clock or speaker on the front right corner glowing cyan and pink. Surround the room with shelves filled with anime figurines and collectible statues on both left and right sides, visible in the background and edges of frame. Lighting is moody and cinematic with saturated purple, pink, and electric blue neon, glossy reflections on glass and plastic, soft bloom, and a cozy futuristic gamer-bedroom atmosphere. Composition should feel intimate, polished, and luxurious, with the seated character centered toward the lower middle, the tri-fold mirror dominating the scene, and the infinite mirror corridor drawing the eye deep into the image. Ultra-detailed, sharp focus on foreground objects and reflections, premium anime illustration, cyberpunk beauty aesthetic.
